# NotificationChannel <kbd>Enum</kbd>

> Delivery channel for user notifications.
> 
> Users can configure per-channel preferences for each notification type.
> EMAIL and PUSH are opt-in; IN_APP is always enabled and cannot be disabled.

**Defined in:** `enums.zmodel`

<details>
<summary>Declaration · <code>enums.zmodel</code></summary>

```prisma
enum NotificationChannel {
    IN_APP
    EMAIL
    PUSH
}
```

</details>

<a id="values"></a>

## 🏷️ Values

> Possible values for this enumeration.

| Value | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `IN_APP` | Displayed in the notification center within the application. |
| `EMAIL` | Sent to the user's primary email address. |
| `PUSH` | Delivered via browser or mobile push notification. |
